summary: The single provided keyframe clearly shows a dining-style setup with chairs around a wooden table, but it does not show enough of the hassock or its surroundings to describe the overall setup near the hassock.

payload.answer: From the provided image, the visible setup is a small wooden table with two wooden chairs positioned around it, and several miscellaneous items placed on top of the table. However, the hassock is not clearly visible in this frame, so I can’t reliably describe the major objects around the chair *and* the overall setup near the hassock based on this single view.
supporting_claims: A wooden table with two nearby wooden chairs is visible (frame 0).
The hassock and its surrounding context are not clearly shown in the provided frame, preventing a grounded description of the hassock area (frame 0).

uncertainties: The hassock is not clearly visible/identifiable in the provided frame, so its surrounding setup cannot be described reliably.
Only one viewpoint is available; the area around the hassock (other nearby furniture/room layout) may be outside the current view.

evidence_items.claim: A wooden table is present with two wooden chairs nearby (one on the left side of the table and one on the right).
There are items on top of the table (miscellaneous objects).

tool_input.request_text: Need wider context around the hassock and chair (surrounding furniture and room layout). Please provide additional keyframes from nearby viewpoints showing the hassock relative to other objects (e.g., sofa/desk/other chairs) and the overall setup.
